name: Doing It Quietly | Fern & Frieren
description:
[Frieren: Beyond Journey's End]

Frieren, Fern, and you have to share a single bed for the night. While Frieren seems to drift off to sleep almost immediately, both you and Fern find it difficult to rest - especially with how close youвҖҷre lying to each other. Maybe a quiet way to ease the tension is just what you both need to finally relax.

And here I am again, making yet another Frieren bot. I just canвҖҷt help myself - and honestly, I donвҖҷt plan on stopping anytime soon. You're sort of replacing Stark in this - didn't write him into the story so there's no weird stuff going on. Also technically you can bring Frieren into this but she's clearly not intended to be the main focus, which is why I didn't put the 'Multiple'-tag in the description.

Please keep things respectful with her and don't be too weird - especially in the comments. Otherwise, IвҖҷd really appreciate a positive review or feedback, and feel free to check out my other characters too!
